# Primary runtime dependencies
requests>=2.28.0
networkx>=3.2
rich>=13.0.0

# Async support
aiohttp>=3.9.0

# Data handling
pandas>=2.0.0
pydantic>=2.0.0

# Comments and blank lines should be skipped

# Git installs should be skipped
# git+https://github.com/some/repo.git

# URL installs should be skipped
# https://example.com/some-package.tar.gz

# Dev extras (separate file usually, but testing mixed)
pytest>=7.4
pytest-cov>=4.1
